creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #15)

Yuri, please read the comments before you push the update.  This port has OpenSSL bundled, which is a huge security risk.  This must be fixed.

Dear submitter, please continue working on unbundling OpenSSL.  Yuri committing your patch does not mean that it's okay to have OpenSSL bundled.
